scripts.smoke:docker: node -e "const {execSync}=require('node:child_process');try{execSync('docker version',{stdio:'inherit'});console.log('[smoke:docker] Docker daemon is reachable.');}catch(error){console.error('[smoke:docker] Docker daemon is unreachable. Start Docker Desktop, wait until it is running, then retry.');console.error('[smoke:docker] Next steps: docker version -> pnpm docker:up');process.exit(1);}"
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm -C packages/db migrate:dev && pnpm -C packages/db generate
